title: 9 herbal tinctures to alleviate eye floaters in seniors
description: Melissa officinalis tinctures, also known as lemon balm, may help alleviate eye floaters by addressing the underlying causes of their appearance. The tincture contains properties such as apigenin, a flavonoid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and rosmarinic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and free radical-scavenging properties. These constituents may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the eyes, potentially contributing to the reduction of eye floaters....
